tool.name: MAF to bigMaf BED
tool.description: convert a preprocessed MAF to a bigMaf BED3+1, bypassing mafToBigMaf overlap rejection

param.label: Reference accession
param.help: Species/assembly accession of the reference row in each MAF block (e.g. GCA_000001.1). The block is anchored on this row; its sequence-name prefix is stripped so the BED chrom matches the chrom-sizes naming.

validator.message: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen, dot only

param.name: input_maf
param.label: Input MAF
param.help: A (preprocessed) multiple alignment file. Must carry a '##maf' header line; only blocks after it are read.

tool.help:
**MAF to bigMaf BED**
Converts a preprocessed [MAF](https://genome.ucsc.edu/FAQ/FAQformat.html#format5) into the BED3+1 form consumed by `bedToBigBed -type=bed3+1` to build a [bigMaf](https://genome.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/help/bigMaf.html) track.
The standard UCSC `mafToBigMaf` tool **rejects MAF files whose reference rows overlap**. Pangenome MAFs (e.g. those derived from `odgi`/graph projections) routinely contain overlapping reference blocks, so this porting step emits the BED directly and skips that check.
For every alignment block the reference row (the `s` line whose species matches the supplied accession) defines the BED interval:
- **chrom** - reference sequence name with the `accession.` prefix stripped, so it matches the chrom-sizes naming. - **chromStart / chromEnd** - the reference start and start+size from the `s` line. - **mafBlock** - the entire MAF block text with newlines replaced by `;` (the UCSC bigMaf convention; see ``bigMaf.as``).
Blocks with no reference row for the given accession are skipped.
-----
**Inputs**
- *Reference accession* - the assembly accession anchoring each block, e.g. ``GCA_000001.1``. ``GCA_``/``GCF_`` accessions are matched as ``prefix.version``; other names match the first dot-delimited token. - *Input MAF* - a multiple alignment file with a ``##maf`` header.
**Output**
- A BED3+1 file (one row per reference-anchored block) ready for ``bedToBigBed -type=bed3+1 -as=bigMaf.as``.
-----
Ported from ``Pv4-pangenome/v3/ucsc_hub/maf_to_bigmaf_bed.py``.
